data.title: Flintridge Sacred Heart Academy receives $5 million gift from alumna Janet Hart Mitchell, establishing scholarship for students in need.
data.description: A scholarship to assist financially disadvantaged students has been established at Flintridge Sacred Heart Academy (FSHA) in LA CAÑADA FLINTRIDGE, Calif. The school recently received a substantial donation of $5 million from the estate of former student Janet Hart Mitchell, who graduated in the Class of 1948. This significant gift will provide necessary support for students in need of financial assistance to pursue their education at FSHA.

data.title: Deadline for investors in StubHub Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: STUB) to contact Berger Montague firm is January 23, 2026, for a class action lawsuit against the company.
data.description: Philadelphia-based law firm Berger Montague PC has recently revealed the filing of a class action lawsuit against StubHub Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: STUB). This lawsuit is on behalf of investors who bought or acquired StubHub shares. The action was initiated on January 21, 2026, and underscores significant legal ramifications against the Company. This development highlights a growing concern in the investor community about their investments in StubHub.

data.title: Kunes Auto & RV Group from DELAVAN, Wis. named to 2025 RVBusiness Top 50 Dealer Awards, showcasing top dealers.
data.description: In Delavan, Wisconsin on January 21, 2026, Kunes Auto & RV Group, a rapidly expanding dealership group in the Midwest, has secured a spot on the prestigious 2025 RVBusiness Top 50 Dealer Awards list. This accolade recognizes outstanding RV dealerships across the country.

data.title: US children gaining access to dental care with Dentistry.One & America's ToothFairy partnership. SmileScan™, an AI-powered scan, will identify oral health concerns.
data.description: Dentistry.One, a virtual-first dental care provider based in Metuchen, New Jersey, has introduced SmileScan™, a complimentary AI-driven oral health scan for families. This innovative tool can detect potential oral issues and deliver a comprehensive oral health rating. The announcement was made on January 21, 2026.

data.title: Filmland Spirits launches The Filmologist™, an AI bartender, entertaining and informing customers. Los Angeles, Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: A popular bourbon brand has revolutionized its approach by utilizing artificial intelligence to engage with consumers. Recently, Filmland Spirits unveiled The Filmologist™, described as a witty bartender who provides entertainment, information, and even playful insults to fans. This innovative move occurred on January 21, 2026 in Los Angeles, marking a significant shift in how the brand interacts with its audience. The AI-infused persona is expected to create a unique experience for customers, showcasing the brand's commitment to staying ahead in the industry.

data.title: KidsChoice receives majority investment from Aquitaine Capital, supporting growth and clinical excellence.
data.description: In a recent development on January 21, 2026, KidsChoice, a company situated in Oklahoma City offering autism and pediatric therapy services, disclosed that they have received a significant majority investment from Aquitaine Capital, a private equity firm owned by women. This investment from Aquitaine Capital will provide KidsChoice with a substantial boost in capital and operating assistance.

data.title: dxFeed reported 27% revenue growth in 2025, marking a decade of sustained expansion in the global financial industry.
data.description: Market data solutions and index management provider, dxFeed, revealed robust financial and operational performance for 2025 with a significant 27% increase in annual revenue compared to the previous year. The company has been consistently growing for over a decade.

data.title: Tower Homes' Huntley Knoll rental community in Pelham, Alabama is fully leased, reflecting increased supply in Birmingham-area market.
data.description: Tower Homes has officially announced that their latest rental home community, Huntley Knoll in Pelham, Alabama, is now fully leased, marking a significant achievement in the Birmingham-area multifamily market. This indicates a successful adjustment to the higher supply in the area. The milestone was reached on January 21, 2026, demonstrating strong demand as all units are now occupied.

data.title: Grant Avenue Capital buys 21st Century Healthcare, a VMS provider for humans and pets, without disclosing terms.
data.description: In New York, Grant Avenue Capital, LLC disclosed their acquisition of 21st Century Healthcare, Inc., a prominent provider of vitamins, minerals, and supplements for humans and pets. The deal, finalized by the healthcare-focused private equity firm founded in 1991, involves undisclosed terms. With a wide range of VMS products under in-house brands, 21st Century has built a strong presence in the market.

data.title: Spectral Capital's subsidiary 42 Telecom exceeds 2025 financial target, announces success in Seattle.
data.description: Seattle, January 21, 2026 - Spectral Capital Corporation revealed today that its subsidiary, 42 Telecom Ltd., has projected surpassing the financial performance goal set for them. The operating subsidiary, recently acquired by Spectral Capital Corporation, expects substantial growth in its financial numbers. The parent company, trading as FCCN on OTCQB, shared this optimistic forecast without specifying exact figures.

data.title: Shore Capital Partners establishes Maintera Facility Services, acquiring Commercial Asset Preservation.
data.description: A new company, Maintera Facility Services, has recently been created by Shore Capital Partners, a leading firm in commercial facility management and vacant property services. Maintera has acquired Commercial Asset Preservation, LLC, which specializes in property maintenance and inspection services for multi-site clients in the food and beverage industry. This strategic move aims to enhance the services offered by Maintera and expand its reach in the market. This acquisition brings together two key players in the industry and positions Maintera as a prominent provider with comprehensive expertise.

data.title: SEOULTECH researchers in South Korea have developed sodium-based smart electrochromic windows using nanorods with thermally removable dopants, potentially offering a practical solution for thermal regulation.
data.description: In South Korea, on January 21, 2026, scientists have discovered that introducing thermally removable dopants into nanorods can unlock their sodium-based electrochromic capacity. This breakthrough offers a practical solution for thermal regulation. The study highlights the importance of thermal management in reducing heating and cooling costs, potentially revolutionizing energy efficiency. This finding could significantly impact various industries by improving the performance of electronic devices and reducing energy consumption. Further research is necessary to explore the full potential of this innovation.

data.title: Comparent honors top 1% of vacation rental management companies with Winter 2026 Market Leader Awards based on ratings, reviews, and performance data.
data.description: Recognizing superior operators through awards based on verified ratings, reviews, and performance data contributes to Comparent's goal of assisting homeowners in selecting the most suitable property manager. This announcement was made in Baltimore on January 21, 2026.

data.title: Premier Food Trucks reveals new battery-powered food truck tech, eliminating generators  & ushering in a generator-free era in mobile kitchens.
data.description: In Bunnell, Florida on January 21, 2026, Premier Food Trucks revealed a groundbreaking advancement set to revolutionize the mobile food sector. The company, renowned for crafting tailored commercial food trucks, introduced a cutting-edge, battery-powered kitchen system. This innovation aims to reshape the industry by eliminating the requirement for traditional power sources, significantly boosting efficiency and sustainability.

data.title: New Vitamin Shoppe opens in Beaufort, SC at 351 Robert Smalls Pkwy. Grand Opening on Jan 31-Feb 1 with promotions.
data.description: The Vitamin Shoppe®, a prominent omni-channel nutritional retailer, has recently opened its new store at 351 Robert Smalls Parkway. The store will mark its Grand Opening with exclusive promotions and giveaways from January 31 to February 1. Located in SECAUCUS, N.J., this exciting event promises fantastic deals for all visitors.

data.title: Beam Global announced the largest residential sale of EV ARC™ systems, increasing adoption among developers.
data.description: Beam Global has revealed that they recently closed their biggest sale of the residential EV ARC™, further pushing its uptake among residential and commercial developers. This move signifies a significant step forward in the adoption of sustainable energy solutions, showcasing the company's commitment to advancing clean energy technologies. This sale includes a substantial number of units, marking a notable milestone for Beam Global as they continue to drive the transition towards more environmentally friendly practices in the residential and commercial sectors.

data.title: XMRWallet integrates full Tor Network, offering users access through dedicated .onion address.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, XMRWallet, a prominent online platform for managing Monero (XMR), revealed the completion of integrating comprehensive Tor Network support into its system. This enhancement enables users to reach their digital assets using a specialized .onion address.
